title: Walksy's (Purified) Shield Fixes
description: Walksy's Shield fixes with a switched out icon so your friends don't give you weird looks.
body:
# [Use Walksy's newer version, it supports 1.21!](https://modrinth.com/mod/complete-shield-fixes)

## I DON'T MAKE MODS
This is just [Walksy's mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/shield-fixes) but without the *unholy* in-game icon.

You shouldn't use both mods together, since they are literally the exact same mod, but with a different icon. I'll try my best to keep this up-to-date.

![proof of permission](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48ad315b98af2388f6f0b094975771bc73adcf6e.png)
